name: Taiga Gold Corp.
summary: Taiga Gold Corp., a mineral exploration company, focuses on the exploration and development of gold projects. Its flagship project is the Fisher project that covers an area of 33,171 hectares located in Saskatchewan, Canada. The company also holds interest in the Mari Lake gold claim covering an area of 5905 hectares located within the Trans Hudson Corridor in Saskatchewan. The company also has interest in Orchid, and Leland gold exploration projects. Taiga Gold Corp. was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Cranbrook, Canada.
